Name: simple_gpio.we_i
Description: Qualifies a bus access as a write, enabling updates to the selected register when combined with cyc_i and stb_i.

Name: simple_gpio.ack_o
Description: Signals completion of a WISHBONE transaction one cycle after a valid access.

Name: simple_gpio.stb_i
Description: Qualifies a data transfer within a bus cycle alongside cyc_i.
